title: mentha × villosa f. amaurophylla
intro: Mentha × villosa f. amaurophylla, also known as woolly mint or woolly-peppermint, is a subspecies of the Mentha villosa plant, which is a hybrid of spearmint and watermint. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural anti-inflammatory and antiseptic, making it effective in treating digestive issues, wounds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Mentha × villosa f. amaurophylla include reducing nausea and headaches, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and indigestion. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
